name: Nocturne

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Umbra Blades
passive.description_source: Innate: Periodically,  Nocturne's next basic attack causes him to slash in a circle that deals increased physical damage to the target and nearby enemies,  healing him for each enemy hit.

effects.description: Innate: Periodically, Nocturne empowers his next basic attack to slash in a circle, dealing 120% AD physical damage to the target and nearby enemies and healing himself for 13 : 32 (based on level) (+ 30% AP) per enemy hit. Against minions, Umbra Blade's damage to secondary targets and healing are reduced by 50% and it applies on-hit effects to all targets(note) at 100% effectiveness.
Umbra Blades can critically strike against the primary target, modifying the physical damage dealt to[ (220% + 33%) AD. ][ 110% AD × total critical damage. ]
Basic attacks reduce Umbra Blades' cooldown by 1 second, increased to 3 against enemy champions and monsters.

passive.description: Innate: Periodically, Nocturne empowers his next basic attack to slash in a circle, dealing 120% AD physical damage to the target and nearby enemies and healing himself for 13 : 32 (based on level) (+ 30% AP) per enemy hit. Against minions, Umbra Blade's damage to secondary targets and healing are reduced by 50% and it applies on-hit effects to all targets(note) at 100% effectiveness.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The primary target of the enhanced attack is dealt basic damage while the secondary targets of the slash are dealt proc damage.

basic_ability_1.name: Duskbringer
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Nocturne casts out a shadow blade in the target direction that leaves a Dusk Trail in its wake, dealing physical damage to enemies hit. Enemy  champions hit will leave a Dusk Trail in their wake for a few seconds.

effects.context_notes: Active: Nocturne casts out a shadow blade in the target direction that leaves a Dusk Trail in its wake, dealing physical damage to enemies hit.
While on the Dusk Trail, Nocturne is ghosted and gains bonus attack damage and bonus total movement speed.
While on the Dusk Trail, Nocturne is ghosted and gains bonus attack damage and bonus total movement speed.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Nocturne casts out a shadow blade in the target direction that leaves a Dusk Trail in its wake, dealing physical damage to enemies hit. Enemy champions and large monsters hit will leave a Dusk Trail behind while moving. Dusk Trails last 5 seconds and will slowly disappear afterwards.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Duskbringer checks for and hits targets 25 units outside of the missile's maximum range.

basic_ability_2.name: Shroud of Darkness
basic_ability_2.description_source: Passive:  Nocturne gains  bonus attack speed.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Nocturne gains bonus attack speed.
Active: Nocturne gains a spell shield for 1.

basic_ability_2.description: Passive: Nocturne gains bonus attack speed.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): If Shroud of Darkness is active when Nocturne re-casts Paranoia to dash to a target, its duration is refreshed every 0.

basic_ability_3.name: Unspeakable Horror
basic_ability_3.description_source: Passive:  Nocturne gains  bonus movement speed while moving towards  feared targets.

effects.description: Passive: Nocturne gains 90% bonus movement speed while facing nearby feared targets.

effects.context_notes: Active: Nocturne torments the target, forming a tether between himself and the target for 2 seconds, during which the target takes magic damage every 0.
Active: Nocturne torments the target, forming a tether between himself and the target for 2 seconds, during which the target takes magic damage every 0.
If the tether is not broken by the end of its duration, the target is feared for a duration while being slowed by 90%.

basic_ability_3.description: Passive: Nocturne gains 90% bonus movement speed while facing nearby feared targets.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Feared enemies in a 180° total angle within Nocturne's facing direction will trigger Unspeakable Horror's passive.

ultimate.name: Paranoia
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Nocturne terrorizes all enemy champions,  nearsighting them for a few seconds. He can recast Paranoia during this time.

effects.description: Active: Nocturne terrorizes all enemy champions, nearsighting them for 6 seconds. He can recast Paranoia for the same duration after 0.25 seconds.

effects.context_notes: Recast: Nocturne dashes with displacement immunity to the target enemy champion, dealing physical damage upon arrival.

effects.description: Nocturne can cast any of his abilities and item actives during the dash.

ultimate.description: Active: Nocturne terrorizes all enemy champions, nearsighting them for 6 seconds. He can recast Paranoia for the same duration after 0.25 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Nocturne will track the target if they change locations.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
